## Summary
- What changed?
- Why?

## Validation
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `./scripts/ci_local.sh`
- [ ] `./scripts/beta_preflight.sh` (for runtime/easy-node changes)
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior/flags changed)

## Risk
- Security impact:
- Operational impact:
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets/keys/tokens committed
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new behavior
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
